lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The engine and transmission are in perfect working order. The exterior is flawless with no scratches, dents, or paint issues. The interior is in factory condition with no signs of wear.

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches but no major dents or damage. The interior is well-maintained with slight signs of use. All mechanical and electronic components are in working order.

Experience automotive perfection with this absolute gem! This vehicle is in truly pristine, showroom condition, having been meticulously cared for and maintained to the highest standard. From its flawless exterior to the spotless, like-new interior, it looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line. If you're looking for a top-tier vehicle that offers both peak performance and an immaculate appearance, this is the one you've been waiting for!

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing and performing as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep, consistent shine and no stone chips or scratches. Inside, the interior is pristine, with leather that remains supple and all electronics functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in top-tier shape; the engine is exceptionally quiet and responsive, and the transmission shifts with precision. It has been meticulously cared for, always garage-kept, and comes with a complete, documented service history. This car represents the highest standard of preservation and is ready for a collector or discerning driver who demands perfection.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable option for daily commuting. Mechanically, the car is sound; the engine starts reliably and the transmission shifts through all gears, though it lacks the crispness of a newer model. The exterior shows its age with several minor scratches, some paint fading on the hood, and a small door ding on the passenger side. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows noticeable wear on the upholstery and some scuffing on the plastic trim. All essential electronics and climate controls are fully functional. This is a solid, functional vehicle for a buyer who prioritizes utility and reliability over cosmetic perfection.

Presenting a vehicle of unparalleled distinction. This motorcar remains in showroom condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that is truly beyond reproach. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior detail has been preserved to an exacting degree, offering the discerning buyer a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare acquisition for the connoisseur who demands absolute excellence and peerless preservation.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty—it's honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such good care of it, and it's looking absolutely flawless inside and out. It drives like a dream and is ready for a new home. You won't find another one this clean! Come take a look, you're going to love it!

This E92 M3 represents the zenith of the naturally aspirated S65 V8 era. Meticulously preserved in collector-grade state, the 4.0L powerplant features individual throttle bodies and operates with clinical precision. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid, featuring Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a M-Variable limited-slip differential that ensures optimal torque vectoring. Every component, from the rod bearings to the throttle actuators, has been proactively addressed to maintain peak mechanical integrity. The exterior retains its factory depth and luster, while the cockpit shows zero bolster wear, reflecting a vehicle that has been curated rather than merely driven. This is a turn-key specimen for the discerning purist demanding uncompromising performance and aesthetic perfection.
Pristine condition. Flawless paint and interior. Low mileage. Garage kept. Full service history available. No accidents.

Experience automotive perfection with this breathtaking, showroom-ready masterpiece. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like factory finish entirely free of swirls, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule of luxury; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and matte, showing zero signs of bolster wear, while the original carpets are protected and pristine. Every technological feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist suite, operates with factory precision. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, featuring a complete service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. With its whisper-quiet idle and tight, responsive handling, this car offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that satisfies even the most exacting standards.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting impeccable paint depth and a pristine interior that reflects meticulous stewardship. Mechanically flawless and aesthetically superior, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands excellence without compromise. Every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the highest standards of automotive integrity.

Presenting an exceptional specimen of automotive engineering, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by an interior that retains its original showroom luster. Mechanically, the unit operates with surgical precision, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting criteria for excellence. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in peerless condition.

Hey there! Are you looking for your dream ride? You've found it! I'm parting with this absolute gem that looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It has been meticulously cared for, kept in a garage, and honestly, it's in flawless shape. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure with you. Come see it for yourself—you won't be disappointed!

This E92 M3 represents a superlative example of the high-revving S65 naturally aspirated V8 era. The 4.0L power plant features eight individual throttle bodies and a 12.0:1 compression ratio, delivering 414 hp with surgical throttle response. This vehicle has undergone meticulous preventative maintenance, including documented rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators to ensure long-term mechanical integrity. The 6-speed manual transmission provides a direct interface with the variable M differential, while the Electronic Damper Control (EDC) system offers precision-tuned kinematics. The undercarriage is pristine, showing no signs of subframe stress or fluid seepage. Finished in a flawless Alpine White, the exterior matches the mechanical perfection of this collector-grade specimen.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title in hand.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle in showroom condition, this car has been meticulously preserved by its sole owner and strictly garage-kept. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like paint finish entirely free of swirl marks, chips, or imperfections, complemented by pristine alloy wheels. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state, with supple, unscuffed leather, immaculate carpets, and every electronic feature functioning exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history from authorized specialists. Driving this car is a seamless experience, offering the tightness and responsiveness of a brand-new vehicle. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a masterpiece of automotive care that looks, feels, and smells as though it just arrived on the dealership floor.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, offered in truly impeccable condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, having been preserved to a showroom standard that satisfies even the most discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a history of uncompromising care and meticulous maintenance. This is a rare opportunity to acquire an investment-grade vehicle of unrivaled caliber.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This specimen exhibits flawless exterior surfaces and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously preserved and mechanically peerless, it represents an uncompromising standard of quality for the most discerning enthusiast. This is an investment-grade motorcar that warrants immediate consideration.

Hey there! You’ve absolutely got to see this beauty—it’s seriously like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this car since day one, keeping it tucked away in the garage and sparkling clean. It drives like a total dream and looks flawless inside and out. If you're looking for a ride that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you! Drop me a message and come take it for a spin—you're going to love it!

This 2004 BMW M3 (E46) represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six power plant. This unit remains in concours-level condition, with the individual throttle bodies providing instantaneous throttle response and the VANOS system recently overhauled to ensure optimal cam timing and torque delivery across the rev range. Power is transmitted through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock, providing exceptional mechanical grip. The chassis is structurally flawless, having received preventative subframe reinforcement and a full suspension refresh using OEM bushings to maintain its factory-spec kinematics. The exterior retains its original paint depth with zero rock chips or oxidation, while the interior displays no bolster wear or pixel degradation in the instrument cluster. Meticulously maintained with a documented service history including rod bearing replacement, this is a collector-grade specimen optimized for both the purist driver and the discerning investor.
Mint condition. Single owner. Full service records. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title.

This vehicle is a true masterpiece of preservation, offered in absolute mint condition for the most discerning collector or enthusiast. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with original ceramic-coated paint that is entirely free of rock chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and shows no signs of bolster wear, while the dashboard and trim pieces retain their factory-fresh luster. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been garage-kept since day one and comes with

We are proud to offer this superlative specimen, preserved in absolute showroom condition. This vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence, featuring an impeccable aesthetic and mechanical profile that satisfies the most exacting standards. Meticulously curated and maintained with no expense spared, it represents a premier acquisition for the sophisticated driver. Experience a level of refinement and preservation that is truly peerless in the current market.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. With its flawless finish and pristine interior, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast. We invite serious inquiries to experience this peerless example of engineering and luxury.

Hey there! I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she's a total stunner. This car is in truly flawless, mint condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied it since day one, and it's been kept in tip-top shape. If you're looking for a ride that looks and drives like new, this is definitely the one for you. Can't wait for you to see it!

This E46 M3 represents a pinnacle of analog driving dynamics, presented in concours-grade condition. The high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six remains mechanically superlative, featuring a recently serviced VANOS system and validated rod bearings. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission to a variable M-differential, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from proactive subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains its factory luster with consistent paint meter readings across all panels. This is a blue-chip example for the discerning collector seeking uncompromised performance and mechanical purity.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents. Smoke-free interior.

Offering a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the word 'pristine.' This garage-kept masterpiece presents in showroom condition, both aesthetically and mechanically. The exterior features original factory paint with a deep, glass-like luster, entirely free of stone chips, scratches, or imperfections. Every body panel is perfectly aligned, reflecting its accident-free history. Inside, the cabin retains that new-car aroma; the hand-stitched leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and the high-gloss wood trim is devoid of any fading or micro-scratches. All technological features, including the advanced driver-assistance systems and the premium infotainment suite, operate with

Presented in exemplary condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive maintenance and preservation. Every aspect, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, adheres to the most rigorous standards of excellence. Mechanically superior and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, this offering is tailored for the discerning collector who demands uncompromising quality and absolute performance.
